gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/126)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/126)
text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) مَنْ صَدَّقَ بِالْخَلَفِ جَادَ بِالْعَطِيَّةِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Al Nowfaly, from Al Sakuny,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘The one who is certain of the Replacement would be generous with the giving’.
en.sarwar: 4. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from al-Nawfaliy from al-Sakuniy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, that the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, has said, ‘One who is certain of (good) consequences, he strives to make it a good gift.’”
